era_context: Late Bronze Age collapse aftermath; Egypt under Ramesses XI; Levantine early Iron Age; Phoenician expansion; Greece in early Iron Age. This period is characterised by political fragmentation and cultural reorganisation.

events.title: Ramesses XI's Reign — Late Phase
events.description: Ramesses XI continues his reign over Egypt. The administrative division between Tanis and Thebes deepens. No specific events are attested for -1014 in surviving sources.
events.certainty_note: Ramesses XI's reign is confirmed, but no specific events are attested for -1014. The year is assigned by chronological convention.

disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: The historical record for -1014 is extremely sparse. No specific events are attested for this year. The chronology of this period remains uncertain by ±10–20 years.
